name: Donald Toad Coin
description: Donald Toad Coin (DTC) is a multichain Web3 gaming token powering Toad Arcade, a cross-network on-chain gaming platform built on Linea and Base. Originally launched on Linea as a meme in 2024, DTC has evolved into a LayerZero-enabled ecosystem focused on skill-based, provably fair games, multichain liquidity, and token-powered competition. With fixed supply integrity and open-source EVM smart contracts, DTC bridges networks while fueling an expanding arcade of on-chain games. Toad Arcade enables multichain gameplay, referral rewards, and token-specific vaults, combining meme culture with transparent, scalable Web3 gaming infrastructure.
